tasks.label: Run on Device (Debug)
tasks.command: ./gradlew installDebug && adb shell am start -n com.nil.behisebe/.MainActivity

tasks.label: Build APK & Export
tasks.command: ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /home/sagniks/Behisebe.apk && echo 'APK saved to /home/sagniks/Behisebe.apk'
